blockingDependency: devyeshtandon/mock-screenshots PR #4 must be independently approved, deployed, and pass fresh uncached hosted-render reliability verification before the hard thresholds can be rerun.

taskSuccess.evidence: Actual MCP Client + StdioClientTransport supports the frozen 1:1/group attachment flows and current warm reruns produced inline image+text.

visualFidelity.evidence: Corrected competitor evidence contains the same frozen two-message/two-attachment input; current MCP previews preserve the messages, times, attachments, and deployed rendering policy.

workflowUsability.evidence: One optional bounded image per message; image-only and mixed messages supported; existing text-only request remains unchanged.

speed.evidence: Current warm production attempts completed in 297 ms, 38 ms, 33 ms, and 33 ms, but cold browser acquisition instability remains a release blocker.

robustness.evidence: Input/error tests pass and MCP fallback is safe, but independent verification observed full-resolution production HTTP 500 responses on 100/100 probes per WhatsApp mode before cache warming. Site PR #4 addresses the diagnosed browser-session cause and remains unmerged.

accessibility.evidence: Alt text is supported and bounded. Independent verification also found a 390 px mobile overflow to 472 px; site PR #4 addresses it and remains unmerged.

outputExport.evidence: Inline previews and fallback links work, but advertised uncached full-resolution hosted URLs failed independent production probes and have not yet passed post-deployment reliability verification.

mcpParity.evidence: The protocol/schema path is implemented and text-only compatibility passes; terminal parity is blocked on stable production hosted output and independent rerun after site PR #4 deployment.

commands.productionProtocol: node docs/pr-evidence/whatsapp-image-attachments/capture-production.mjs (current warm rerun: 4/4 inline image+text; historical independent cold probes: blocking HTTP 500s)

protocolDefinitions.inlineImageAndTextSuccess: MCP content includes image and text; text includes hosted/edit URLs and ethics/privacy warnings.
protocolDefinitions.textLinkFallback: MCP content includes text only because the production preview render failed; hosted/edit URLs and warnings remain available. This is graceful degradation, not hosted-output success.

historicalObservation: Warm rerun recovery does not erase the independent cold-state failures. Release remains blocked until site PR #4 is deployed and identical uncached reliability probes pass.
